news.t: First Trust Launches First Trust RBA Deglobalization ETF

holdings.infoBox: DGLO is an equity ETF with a total of 113 individual holdings. The top holdings are General Dynamics stock at 3.09%, Union Pacific at 2.73%, Republic Services at 2.45%, Packaging Corporation of America at 2.37%, and CSX Corporation at 2.02%.

overview.description: The First Trust RBA Deglobalization ETF (DGLO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the RBA U.S. Deglobalization index. The fund tracks an index of US companies across all market capitalizations from sectors expected to benefit from deglobalization. The fund utilizes an optimizer to minimize stock-specific risk. DGLO was launched on Aug 6, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust RBA Deglobalization ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
